description_long: This house features a simple, boxy two-story structure with a flat red roof and a prominent central chimney. The front facade is characterized by large rectangular windows arranged symmetrically on both floors, and a main entryway with a small tiled awning and a set of steps leading up to the door. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, giving the building a clean and modern appearance. The rear side of the house has a similar window arrangement but lacks the awning and features double doors. The roof is flat and accessible, with a single chimney stack rising from its center. The house sits on a paved stone platform that extends around its perimeter.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat red roof, large symmetrical windows, and a central chimney, set on a paved stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a tiled awning, steps, and large symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat red roof, central chimney, and plain wall with minimal features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying double doors, symmetrical windows, and the chimney stack on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear view of the flat roof, chimney, and plain wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with tiled awning, steps, and double doors
